properties.name: web.server.url
properties.description: The URL of the web server.

properties.name: data.server.url
properties.description: The URL of the GraphQL data server.

properties.name: data.server.tmpdir
properties.description: The temporary directory for backup/restore operations.

properties.name: jwt.server-url
properties.description: The URL of the JWT authentication server.

properties.name: jwt.header
properties.description: The header name for the JWT token (e.g., Authorization).

properties.name: jwt.prefix
properties.description: The prefix for the JWT token (e.g., Bearer).

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: The key with which the JWT token is signed.

properties.name: jwt.duration-ms
properties.description: The time-to-live of the JWT token in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.authority-claim
properties.description: The claim name for the JWT authorities (e.g., entitlements).
